# sevalla_global_environment_variable (Resource)

Manages a Sevalla global environment variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sevalla_global_environment_variable" "example" {
  key          = "LOG_LEVEL"
  value        = "info"
  is_runtime   = true
  is_buildtime = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The key of the environment variable.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The value of the environment variable.

### Optional

- `is_buildtime` (Boolean) Whether this environment variable is available at build time.
- `is_runtime` (Boolean) Whether this environment variable is available at runtime.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the global environment variable was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the global environment variable.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the global environment variable was last updated.
